# Tribute Band The Kills

> Tribute Band The Kills is a professional tribute act based in Montpellier, Hérault, dedicated to recreating the minimalist garage rock sound and explosive energy of Alison Mosshart and Jamie Hince's iconic duo, The Kills. Available for festivals, clubs, and private events throughout Occitanie and beyond.

## Genre and instruments

Garage rock, indie rock, tribute, minimalist rock. Two guitars and drums, faithful to The Kills' signature stripped-down setup. Repertoire spans all major Kills albums from "Keep On Your Mean Side" to "Blood Pressures" and beyond.

## Members

- Mathieu, Lucie, and Francis: a trio that met at an open mic night in Montpellier and bonded over their shared love for The Kills' raw garage sound.

## Service area

Montpellier, Nîmes, Toulouse, festivals and clubs throughout Occitanie and Southern France.

## Pages

- [Home (French)](https://the-kills.lourock.com/fr)
- [Home (English)](https://the-kills.lourock.com/en)

## Booking

Part of the LouRock collective. Booking via [lourock.com](https://lourock.com) or the contact section of the site.
